linear.description: Read issues, roadmap state, sprint backlog; write tickets; update status

jira.description: Read Jira board, backlog, sprint state; create and update issues

notion.description: Read and write spec pages, search knowledge base, pull meeting notes

slack.description: Pull channel context, read thread sentiment, send stakeholder updates

github.description: Read issue backlog, check PR velocity, correlate engineering output with roadmap
